# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.3-codex-spark-xhigh

## Summary

No implementation changes are present in this diff. The only modified files are `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm-4/journal.ndjson` and `.ralph-burning/projects/rlm-4/run.json`, which contain orchestration/review metadata only (rollback and final-review session tracking), with no executable project code changes to review for correctness, safety, or robustness regressions.

## Amendments

None.
